title: How I Turned a Manual Workflow Into a Small Automation
description: A sample JSON payload for the blog publisher automation.
body:
# How I Turned a Manual Workflow Into a Small Automation

This post was generated from a JSON payload and written by the automation script.

## Why this matters

A lightweight content pipeline makes it easier to publish consistently without editing the site by hand every time.

## What the automation does

- Reads structured JSON
- Converts it into Astro-compatible markdown
- Schedules the publish time inside the frontmatter
- Commits the result to a dedicated Git branch

## Next step

Hook this script up to a scheduler or a Hermes sub-agent so the content can be generated and queued automatically.
